translations.en: As you kneel before the altar, a mystical voice sounds in your head.
translations.zh: 當你跪在祭壇前，一個神秘的聲音在你腦中迴響。

translations.en: "Thou hast much to learn about humility."
translations.zh: 「汝對謙遜仍有許多須學習之處。」
「汝之行為展現了令人欽佩的謙遜。」

translations.en: "Thy deeds serve as an example to all."
Do you wish to meditate at this altar?
translations.zh: 你希望在此祭壇冥想嗎？
translations.note: 旁白提示，尾隨空格保留

translations.en: "The humblest citizen of all the land,
when clad in the armor of a righteous cause,
translations.zh: 當披上正義大義的鎧甲，

translations.en: is stronger than all the hosts of error."
translations.zh: 比所有謬誤之眾更為強大。」

translations.note: 升級旁白（謙遜無特定能力提升，故用！而非……）

translations.en: "There is naught else for you to learn here and now."
"Return when thy journey has progressed further."
translations.zh: 「待汝的旅程更進一步，再行回返。」

translator_notes: 謙遜神殿，真言 lum（不翻譯）。謙遜是唯一不賦予原則衍生屬性的德行——需單獨修行，無法與其他德行組合。聖言三段合一引自 William Jennings Bryan，謙卑之人因正義而強大的主題。升級符號用「！」而非「……」，呼應本神殿的特殊性。
